steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Distribute 7xy across both terms inside the parentheses: 7xy · 2x² = 14x³y and 7xy · 8y = 56xy².

choiceElimination:
• '$14x^{3}y + 56y^{2}$': The second term is missing the x factor. 7xy · 8y = 56xy², not 56y². ✗
  • '$14x^2y + 56xy$': First term drops an x (should be x³), second term drops a y (should be xy²). ✗
  • '$14x^{2}y + 56xy^{2}$': First term has x² instead of x³; 7xy · 2x² = 14x³y, not 14x²y. ✗
  • '$14x^3y + 56xy^2$': Both terms match the distribution exactly. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
